category_sources: Official homepage describes D2 as a modern language that turns text to diagrams.
source_facts.description says D2 is a modern diagram scripting language that turns text to diagrams.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is d2; official homepage branding uses D2.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage points to d2lang.com, whose official page is titled D2 Documentation and links to its Tour docs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/terrastruct/d2, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official homepage highlights diagramming features, CLI use, exports, layouts, and language API.
source_facts.description says it turns text to diagrams.
